notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate. Audits against all five impact variables with specific gaps and ask-M questions. Routing-tier analysis is precise — names the three threshold criteria and shows the CR fails all three; identifies Tier 2-or-3 correctly. Surfaces three political dimensions (capacity displacement, V. Bauer history, J. Patel-vs-A. Wong dynamic). Catches both alternatives and recommendation gaps with three specific alternatives proposed. Change log dim widened to tolerance 2 because the learner mentions the three-entries-in-four-months signal but treats it as separate from this CR rather than connecting it to the broader silent-absorption pattern (which the chapter frames as the same problem). Not yet hire-ready because the analysis is competent but the closing is sequential ('take it back, do X, Y, Z, resubmit') rather than tiered (urgent-fixes-for-tomorrow vs structural-fixes-for-the-process).
